name: @carlwr/zsh-core-tooldef
description: Declarative tool definitions over @carlwr/zsh-core — framework-neutral metadata + pure (corpus, input) → output implementations shared by MCP, CLI and VS Code adapters.

scripts.format: biome check --error-on-warnings --write index.ts build.ts deno.json scripts src tsconfig.build.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts package.json
scripts.lint: biome check --error-on-warnings index.ts build.ts deno.json scripts src tsconfig.build.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts package.json
scripts.test:integration: pnpm build && export BZ_SKIP_UPSTREAM=1 && pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:smoke
